prompt: Create a dramatic cinematic fantasy portrait of a handsome young man sitting cross-legged on a wet dark ground at night in a moody forest or dim urban woodland setting, wearing a dark emerald green floral button-up shirt, open at the collar, fitted black pants, and black shoes. He has thick black hair swept upward and to one side, but his face is completely hidden by a large opaque medium-brown square censor block centered over the entire face. His left hand is cupped low in front of his lap, holding a glowing magical heart made of fire, emerald-green energy, smoke, and molten light; the heart emits orange flames, teal mist, golden sparks, and bright radiant highlights. His right hand is raised near his chest, tilting a transparent glass tumbler and pouring a stream of water downward directly onto the flaming heart, creating a bright splash, steam, and magical energy burst where water meets fire. Use warm amber backlighting, shallow depth of field, soft circular bokeh lights in the background, rain-wet reflections on the ground, high contrast, realistic skin and fabric texture, detailed hands, dynamic particles, smoke wisps, and cinematic color grading with orange fire versus teal-green magic. Vertical portrait composition, full seated body visible from head to shoes, subject centered, ultra-realistic fantasy photo style, no text or watermark.
